messages.content: I'm doing well, Sir, ready to help you with anything you need, just like I was when we discussed Ireland and Elon Musk earlier.
write a application to teacher that telling her I am not coming today
Dear Teacher, I am writing to inform you that I will not be able to attend school today, Sir.
can you open calculator for me please
create an image of girls seeing her in a mirror and doing Beauty
I'm working on the generate image in the background. I'll open it for you when it's ready.
